title: COLT Cargo
summary: Colt Linhas Aéreas, operating as COLT Cargo, was an ACMI cargo airline based in São Paulo, Brazil. It was founded in 2013 by COLT Aviation, a  charter company.
text:
Colt Linhas Aéreas, operating as COLT Cargo, was an ACMI cargo airline based in São Paulo, Brazil. It was founded in 2013 by COLT Aviation, a  charter company.
